$Comment: The Void DamageCause is authored by the MMO Skill Tree jar's Phase I 4-school roster work (unprefixed, under Elemental), NOT by this mod. Without that jar (or a pack) shipping Server/Entity/Damage/Void.json, Mmoscaling_Ward_Void.json fails EntityEffect asset validation at load and this affix logs a warn-once at apply - a known, documented degraded mode until Phase I ships.
Name: ward_void
